meta.title: St. Augustine — Ryan Family Reunion
meta.description: Long weekend in St. Augustine with Meghan's family. Brett's family is local; Chris and Kim bringing their families too. 4 days of beach, cousins, and the oldest city in the U.S.

flightOptions.rentalCarNote: Std SUV (Blazer) — alts: Hertz Midsize $211 / Avis Std $244 / Costco SUV from $248
flightOptions.priceAsOfNote: Prices as of Apr 26, 2026 via fli (Google Flights) + Hertz/Avis/Costco/Capital One Travel — subject to change

rentalCarOptions.notes: Cheapest Std SUV; PC = skip-counter + likely free upgrade
Stretch — book Midsize, PC will likely upgrade you
AWD upgrade vs Blazer for $10 more
Big — only if you want max space

bookings.label: Southwest · STL → JAX (recommended)
bookings.detail: Wed Jul 15 · WN 3771 · STL 10:15 AM → JAX 1:15 PM ET. Only nonstop option. ~2h flight.
bookings.notes: Only nonstop STL→JAX on Jul 15. 1-stop alternates start at $649 but add 2-4 hrs of connection time — not worth it with Louise. Book early — single nonstop daily, will sell out.

bookings.label: Southwest · JAX → STL (recommended)
bookings.detail: Sat Jul 18 · WN 449 · JAX 6:20 PM ET → STL 7:30 PM CT. Nonstop, 2h 10m. Late departure maximizes Saturday in St. Augustine.
bookings.notes: Two WN nonstop returns: 8:25 AM (cuts Saturday short) or 6:20 PM (full day). The 6:20 PM is the better fit — lands STL ~7:30 PM, manageable bedtime for Louise.

bookings.label: Rental Car at JAX
bookings.carrier: TBD — Capital One Travel / National / Hertz
bookings.detail: Standard SUV (CR-V/RAV4 class). Pickup Jul 15 ~2:00 PM, return Jul 18 ~4:30 PM (90 min before flight).
bookings.paidWith: Likely Capital One Venture X miles (like NH/Atlanta)
bookings.notes: Recommended path: Capital One Travel (used for last 2 trips, miles redemption). Backup: National (Executive Elite free upgrade) or Hertz (President's Circle). Need a Standard SUV — 4 pax + Louise's car seat + 4 days of beach luggage. JAX → St. Augustine is ~50 min drive south.
alertNotes: Compare across Capital One Travel, National, Hertz, Costco before booking
Bring Louise's car seat — rental companies are unreliable on car seats

bookings.label: Lodging in St. Augustine
bookings.detail: Coordinate with Brett — staying with him? Or group Airbnb / beach house?
bookings.notes: Meghan's brother Brett lives in St. Augustine. Kim and Chris also coming with families — a single beach-house rental near Vilano Beach or Crescent Beach could fit everyone if Brett has space limits.

timeline.title: Fly to Jacksonville + Drive to St. Augustine

events.text: Wake up, final pack, kids ready
Uber to STL airport
✈ WN 3771 · STL → JAX (nonstop, 2h)
Land JAX. Walk to ground transport / car rental
🚗 Pick up rental car
Drive JAX → St. Augustine (~50 min, I-95 S to SR-16 E)
Arrive St. Augustine. Unpack, settle in
Family dinner — see Brett & crew, casual catch-up

items.text: SET ALARM: 10:15 AM Tue Jul 14 — Southwest 24-hr check-in opens for boarding positions. Both Michael and Meghan check in simultaneously
Pack swimsuits, sunscreen (SPF 50+), bug spray, hats, sunglasses for everyone
Pack Louise's car seat (rental companies don't reliably stock them)
Swim diapers for Louise if she's still in them
Charge iPad + headphones for the flight + drive
Southwest WN 3771 · STL 10:15 AM → JAX 1:15 PM ET (nonstop, 2h)
Time zone: STL is CT, JAX is ET — 1 hour ahead. Adjust kids' watches/phones
Southwest carry-on + personal item included on all fares. No bag fees
This is the only nonstop on Jul 15 — book early
JAX → St. Augustine: 47 mi, ~50 min (I-95 S → SR-16 E or US-1 S)
Stop at Buc-ee's at Daytona Beach if you've never been (45 min south of St. A) — but only on a separate day, not arrival
Quick grocery run on the way: Publix on Anastasia Blvd or US-1 has everything for the weekend

events.text: Breakfast at the house. Sunscreen on the kids early
🏖 Beach day — St. Augustine Beach or Crescent Beach
Lunch on the beach or back at the house. Louise nap
Pool time / more beach / cousin time
Family cookout / dinner together

items.text: St. Augustine Beach: Wide, gentle, family-friendly. Pier at A St. has parking, restrooms, food. Best for kids
Crescent Beach: Quieter, can drive on the sand (Matanzas Inlet area). Good if a big family group wants room to spread
Vilano Beach: North of town, less crowded. Steeper drop-off so watch Louise
July sea temp ~84°F. Air ~90°F. Plan beach for early morning or late afternoon — midday sun is brutal
Sun: Reapply SPF every 90 min on the kids. Florida sun in July will burn through cheap sunscreen
Jellyfish + rip currents: Check daily flag at the lifeguard stand. Purple flag = stingers, red = rip current
Hydration: Bring a cooler with water + electrolytes. Heat exhaustion sneaks up on toddlers
Afternoon storms: July is daily-thunderstorm season. Pop-ups around 3-5 PM. Have a backup indoor plan

timeline.title: Old Town + Castillo (or another beach day)

events.text: Breakfast. Decide: Old Town or beach?
Castillo de San Marcos / Old Town walking tour OR beach day round 2
Lunch in Old Town (Columbia, Catch 27, or food truck) — Louise nap if needed
Pool / pirate museum / Old Jail / sea turtle hospital — kid-friendly options
Family dinner — Cap's on the Water or back at the house

items.text: Castillo de San Marcos: Spanish stone fort from 1672. National Park, $15/adult, kids under 16 free. Great views from the gun deck. ~1.5 hrs
St. George Street: Pedestrian-only Old Town main drag. Shops, ice cream, street performers. Walkable with Louise
Old Trolley Tour: Hop-on/hop-off, 22 stops. Great way to do Old Town with a tired toddler — A/C bus
Pirate & Treasure Museum: Kenna will love it. Real pirate artifacts, interactive. ~$15/adult
St. Augustine Alligator Farm: 100+ alligators, croc feeding shows. ~$30/adult, $20/child. Half-day attraction
Marineland: Dolphin encounters (pricey but unforgettable). 20 min south of St. A
Whetstone Chocolate Factory tour: 30 min, free samples. Cool indoor break
Anastasia State Park: Calm-water lagoon (better for Louise than ocean), trails, beach access. $8/car
Cap's on the Water: Sunset on the Intracoastal, fresh seafood, kid menu. Reservation needed
Catch 27: Locally caught fish, Old Town. Smaller, more refined
The Floridian: Farm-to-table, vegetarian-friendly, lively
Or just cook at the house — easier with toddlers and a big family group

events.text: Last beach swim. Soak up the salt water
Lunch + start packing
Showers, final pack, sweep the house
🚗 Drive St. Augustine → JAX (~50 min)
Return rental car at JAX
Through TSA, dinner at JAX, gate
✈ WN 449 · JAX → STL (nonstop)
Land STL. Uber home

items.text: Leave St. Augustine by 3:30 PM. 50 min drive + 30 min car return + 1 hr TSA buffer = at gate by 5:50 PM for 6:20 PM flight
JAX is a small, easy airport — 30 min from car return to gate is realistic on a Saturday evening
Check Saturday afternoon I-95 traffic — usually fine northbound, but storms can slow it
Sweep the house: chargers, swimsuits, sand toys, beach towels, sunscreen
Empty fridge if it's a rental — consolidate or trash perishables
Get Louise's car seat back in the rental for the JAX drive
Last-minute pickle: Louise will be sandy + tired. Quick rinse + change of clothes before the airport
Southwest WN 449 · JAX 6:20 PM → STL 7:30 PM CT (nonstop, 2h 10m)
Southwest open seating — check in at 6:20 PM ET on Fri 7/17 (24 hr before)
Family boarding for Louise: between A and B. No need to scramble for early A positions

estimated.note: depends on Brett's place vs. group rental

budget.savingsNote: If Brett hosts: save $400-800 on lodging. If Capital One miles for rental: save ~$320-400 cash.

checklist.text: Confirm Jul 15–18 with Brett, Chris, Kim — everyone aligned?
Decide lodging: Brett's place vs. group beach house rental
Book Southwest nonstops — WN 3771 out, WN 449 return. Single nonstop daily, will sell out
Book rental car at JAX — compare Capital One Travel (miles), National (Executive Elite), Hertz (President's Circle), Costco
If booking via points: research which fare class works (Wanna Get Away+ for Cash + Points)
Pack Louise's car seat for the rental — don't rely on rental company stock
Beach gear: sunscreen SPF 50+, bug spray, swim diapers, hats, sand toys, beach umbrella
Coordinate group meals with the Ryans — who's cooking which night?
Set alarm Tue Jul 14, 10:15 AM — Southwest 24-hr check-in for outbound (best boarding positions)
Set alarm Fri Jul 17, 6:20 PM ET — Southwest 24-hr check-in for return
Plan one dinner out — Cap's on the Water sunset reservation if going
